title: hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsiflorum
intro: Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsiflorum, also known as a lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and China. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium sparsum subsp. subsparsiflorum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
